requirements.description: Sunita Agarwal is Client CEO responsible for vision, business decisions, and final approvals.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Rajesh Mehta is Client PM responsible for operational requirements, integrations, and technical decisions.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: Arjun Shah is BA responsible for requirements elicitation and documentation.
requirements.speaker: Arjun Shah

requirements.description: Priya Nair is PM responsible for project delivery, integration planning, and timeline management.
requirements.speaker: Priya Nair

requirements.description: End customers browse, search, and purchase products on the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Store managers view regional orders and manage returns via the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Central admin team manages products, pricing, and promotions across the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Vendor partners manage their own inventory and product listings via dedicated login.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Platform must go live within 6 months maximum from project start.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform is deployed and accessible to customers within 6 months.

requirements.description: System must support credit card payments for customer purchases.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can successfully complete a purchase using a credit card.

requirements.description: System must support credit card EMI payment option at checkout.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can select credit card EMI and complete purchase successfully.

requirements.description: System must integrate with Bajaj Finance API for no-cost EMI financing.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can select Bajaj Finance no-cost EMI and receive financing approval.

requirements.description: Bajaj Finance API integration is feasible given existing client agreement.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: ZestMoney partnership agreement will be finalized before platform go-live.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: System must provide separate login portal for vendor partners to manage listings.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can log in and access only their own product and inventory data.

requirements.description: Vendors cannot set product prices; only RetailCorp central admin controls pricing.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendor portal has no price editing capability; price fields are read-only.

requirements.description: Vendors must be able to manage their own inventory quantities via the portal.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can update inventory count and changes reflect on the platform.

requirements.description: Vendors must be able to manage product information and descriptions via the portal.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can edit product descriptions and images successfully.

requirements.description: Store managers must view orders filtered by their geographic region.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Store manager sees only orders associated with their assigned region.

requirements.description: Store managers must be able to manage customer returns from their region.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Store manager can initiate and process a return for a regional order.

requirements.description: System must integrate with SAP ERP for product catalog data migration and sync.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Product data from SAP is accurately reflected in the platform catalog.

requirements.description: Inventory levels must sync with SAP ERP in real time.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Inventory update in SAP reflects on platform within 60 seconds.

requirements.description: Product information must sync from SAP via batch process once daily.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Product information batch sync from SAP completes successfully once every 24 hours.

requirements.description: Out-of-stock products must not be displayed as available to customers.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Product sold out in SAP is marked unavailable on platform within real-time sync window.

requirements.description: Existing SAP ERP has accessible APIs or data export capability for integration.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: Platform must support a product catalog of up to 25,000 SKUs.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Platform successfully lists and searches across 25,000 SKUs without degradation.

requirements.description: Customers must be able to search products by name, category, and brand.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Search returns relevant results for product name, category, and brand queries.

requirements.description: Customers must be able to filter search results by price range.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Filtered results contain only products within the selected price range.

requirements.description: Customers must be able to filter search results by estimated delivery time.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Filtered results show only products deliverable within the selected timeframe.

requirements.description: Customers must be able to submit product reviews and ratings.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can submit a review and it enters a moderation queue.

requirements.description: Admin must be able to moderate customer reviews before they are published.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Review is not visible to customers until admin approves it.

requirements.description: Customer reviews must not go live without admin moderation approval.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: No unmoderated review is publicly visible on any product page.

requirements.description: Customers must be able to save products to a wishlist for future purchase.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Customer can add a product to wishlist and retrieve it in a later session.

requirements.description: System must integrate with Delhivery API for shipping rates and order tracking.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Shipping rates from Delhivery are displayed at checkout and tracking updates are shown.

requirements.description: Customers must be able to track their order in real time within the platform.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Customer can view live order tracking status on their order detail page.

requirements.description: Platform must comply with GDPR regulations for NRI customer data handling.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform passes GDPR compliance audit for data collection and processing.

requirements.description: Platform must comply with Indian IT Act regulations.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform meets all requirements under the Indian Information Technology Act.

requirements.description: All customer data must be stored on servers physically located within India.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Infrastructure audit confirms all data storage nodes are in Indian data centers.

requirements.description: Platform must handle a minimum of 50,000 concurrent users during peak traffic.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Load test confirms platform remains stable with 50,000 concurrent users.

requirements.description: All platform pages must load within 3 seconds under normal and peak conditions.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Performance test shows 95th percentile page load time is under 3 seconds.

requirements.description: System must generate daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can generate and download sales reports for daily, weekly, and monthly periods.

requirements.description: Sales reports must be filterable by region, product category, and vendor.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can filter sales report by region, category, and vendor and results are accurate.

requirements.description: System must provide cart abandonment analytics showing viewed-but-not-purchased products.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta
acceptance_criteria: Analytics dashboard shows products added to cart but not purchased with abandonment rate.

requirements.description: System must support sending promotional emails to customers.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create and send a promotional email campaign to a customer segment.

requirements.description: Platform will require a marketing tool or third-party integration for email and SMS campaigns.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: RetailCorp will provide existing product data from SAP for initial catalog migration.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: 50,000 peak concurrent users is based on physical store footfall as a proxy metric.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal

requirements.description: Platform must integrate with existing SAP ERP system already in use by RetailCorp.
requirements.speaker: Rajesh Mehta

requirements.description: Platform must scale to support high traffic during seasonal sale events like Diwali.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Platform remains available and performant during simulated Diwali-scale load test.

requirements.description: Central admin must be able to manage product listings across the entire catalog.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create, edit, and deactivate any product in the catalog.

requirements.description: Central admin must be able to manage pricing for all products on the platform.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can update product price and change is immediately reflected on the storefront.

requirements.description: Central admin must be able to create and manage promotional campaigns.
requirements.speaker: Sunita Agarwal
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create a promotion and it is applied correctly at checkout.

requirements.description: The system shall allow new customers to register using email or mobile number.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can successfully register with a valid email or mobile number and receive confirmation.

requirements.description: The system shall allow registered customers to log in via email/password or OTP.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can log in successfully using either email/password or a valid OTP.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to search products by name, brand, or category.
acceptance_criteria: Search returns relevant results when queried by product name, brand, or category.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to filter search results by price, brand, rating, and delivery time.
acceptance_criteria: Applying any filter updates search results to show only matching products.

requirements.description: The system shall display detailed product information including images, specs, price, and reviews.
acceptance_criteria: Product detail page shows images, description, specifications, price, and customer reviews.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to add one or more products to a shopping cart.
acceptance_criteria: Selected products appear in the cart with correct quantities and prices.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to save products to a personal wishlist for later purchase.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can add a product to wishlist and retrieve it in a subsequent session.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to add and select a delivery address during checkout.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can save a new address and select it as the delivery address before placing an order.

requirements.description: The system shall support payment via credit card, debit card, UPI, net banking, and EMI.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can complete a purchase using each of the five supported payment methods.

requirements.description: The system shall provide customers with real-time order tracking after purchase.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can view live shipment status and estimated delivery time for a placed order.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers who purchased a product to submit a review and rating.
acceptance_criteria: Only verified purchasers can submit a rating and text review for a product.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admin to approve or reject customer reviews before publication.
acceptance_criteria: Only admin-approved reviews are visible to customers on the product page.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admin to add, edit, and deactivate products in the catalog.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create a new product, update its details, and deactivate it so it no longer appears to customers.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admin to set and update product prices and discounts.
acceptance_criteria: Updated price or discount is reflected on the product page immediately after admin saves changes.

requirements.description: The system shall sync inventory levels with SAP in real time to reflect accurate stock availability.
acceptance_criteria: Out-of-stock products are marked unavailable on the platform within one minute of SAP inventory update.

requirements.description: The system shall allow vendors to create, update, and manage their product listings.
acceptance_criteria: Vendor can add a new listing, edit product details, and publish changes visible to customers.

requirements.description: The system shall allow store managers to view all customer orders within their region.
acceptance_criteria: Store manager dashboard displays all orders filtered to their assigned region.

requirements.description: The system shall provide central admin with sales reports filterable by day, week, month, category, region, and vendor.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can generate and export a sales report for any supported time period and dimension combination.

requirements.description: The system shall report products added to cart but not purchased to central admin.
acceptance_criteria: Admin dashboard displays an abandoned-cart report listing products and abandonment counts.

requirements.description: The system shall allow central admin to send promotional campaigns to customers via email and SMS.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can create a campaign, select target audience, and dispatch it via email and SMS successfully.

requirements.description: The system shall provide a fully functional mobile application for Android and iOS devices.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can browse, search, and complete a purchase on both Android and iOS mobile apps.

requirements.description: The system shall display key business metrics to executives via a mobile dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: Executive can view KPIs such as revenue, orders, and conversion rate on the mobile app dashboard.

requirements.description: The system shall allow customers to initiate a return request for a delivered product.
acceptance_criteria: Customer can submit a return request with reason, and the system confirms receipt and initiates refund workflow.

requirements.description: The system shall integrate with Delhivery and BlueDart APIs for shipping rate calculation and order tracking.
acceptance_criteria: Shipping cost is auto-calculated at checkout and tracking status is retrieved from Delhivery and BlueDart APIs.

glossary.ShopEase: The e-commerce platform being built for RetailCorp India to enable online retail of home appliances, electronics, and furniture.
glossary.RetailCorp India: The client organization, a mid-size retail chain with approximately 200 physical stores across India, commissioning the ShopEase platform.
glossary.SKU: Stock Keeping Unit — a unique identifier for each distinct product variant in the catalog; platform must support up to 25,000 SKUs.
glossary.No-Cost EMI: An equated monthly installment option where the customer pays no interest, facilitated through financing partners such as Bajaj Finance or ZestMoney.
glossary.Bajaj Finance API: Third-party financing partner API to be integrated into ShopEase to enable no-cost EMI payment options at checkout.
glossary.ZestMoney: A digital lending partner whose agreement with RetailCorp is assumed to be finalized before platform go-live, enabling additional EMI financing.
glossary.Delhivery API: Third-party logistics provider API integrated into ShopEase for real-time shipping rate calculation and order tracking.
glossary.SAP ERP: RetailCorp's existing enterprise resource planning system used as the source of truth for product catalog data and inventory levels, requiring integration with ShopEase.
glossary.Vendor Portal: A dedicated login interface allowing vendor partners to manage their own product information, descriptions, and inventory quantities, while pricing remains controlled by central admin.
glossary.Central Admin: RetailCorp's internal team responsible for managing the entire product catalog, pricing, and promotional campaigns across the ShopEase platform.
glossary.Store Manager: A regional RetailCorp employee who can view orders and manage returns filtered by their specific geographic region via the platform.
glossary.Cart Abandonment Analytics: A reporting feature that tracks products viewed or added to cart but not purchased, providing insight into lost sales opportunities.
glossary.Peak Concurrent Users: The maximum number of simultaneous active users the platform must support, set at 50,000, derived from physical store footfall data as a proxy metric.
glossary.Review Moderation: The workflow by which central admin reviews and approves customer-submitted product ratings and reviews before they are published on the platform.
glossary.NRI Customer: Non-Resident Indian customer whose data handling must comply with GDPR regulations in addition to the Indian IT Act.
